item.name: Golding
item.description:
Often likened to a pile of sunken gold coins, this wavekin has sentenced no few greedy souls to a watery demise in Mjrl's Tears.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: The flat, golden scales of this fish resemble a scattering of gold coins from the water's surface. Those greedy few who mistake it as such, however, will find themselves dragged into the depths before they can claim the false fortune as their own.
